briefdescription.para: Regular expression which extracts both formulas from $a vs $b
Regular expression which extracts formulas pairs from $a vs $b\rand\r$c vs $d\rand\r...

detaileddescription.para: This assertion does not indicate a genearl programmer error but a sweep formula user error.
All programmer error checks must still use ASSERT().

briefdescription.para: preparse user input to correct formula patterns
serialize a string formula into JSON

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default 0] set on recursive calls, returns boolean if parser created a JSON array
[internal use only] recursive call level, used for debug output

briefdescription.para: Create a new empty array object, add mainId into it at path and return created json, release subId.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable mainId, string jsonPath, variable subId, variable arrayWasCreated)
memberdef.name: SF_FPAddArray

briefdescription.para: Adds subId to mainId, if necessary puts subId into an array, release subId.
add escape characters to a path element

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, string formula, dfref dfr=defaultValue, variable dmMode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SF_FormulaPlotter

briefdescription.para: Plot the formula using the data from graph.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default DM_SUBWINDOWS] display mode that defines how multiple sweepformula graphs are arranged

xrefdescription.para: Removes dimension labels in COLS and LAYERS
Removes dimension labels in COLS and LAYERS

memberdef.argsstring: (wave wv, variable dim, variable i, variable split)
memberdef.name: SF_SplitPlotting

detaileddescription.para: split dimension dim of wave wv into slices of size split and get the starting index i

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, string epochName, variable sweep, variable channel)
memberdef.name: SF_GetRangeFromEpoch

briefdescription.para: Returns a range from a epochName.

simplesect.para: a 1D wave with two elements, [startTime, endTime] in ms, if no epoch could be resolved [NaN, NaN] is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, variable sweep, variable channelType, variable channelNumber)
memberdef.name: SF_GetDAChannel

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, wave range, wave channels, wave sweeps)
memberdef.name: SF_GetSweepForFormula

memberdef.argsstring: (wave source, wave dest, variable dimSource, variable dimDest)
memberdef.name: SF_FormulaWaveScaleTransfer

briefdescription.para: transfer the wave scaling from one wave to another

detaileddescription.para: Note: wave scale transfer requires wave units for the first wave in the array that

parameterdescription.para: Wave whos scaling should get transferred
Wave that accepts the new scaling

simplesect.para: 0 if wave scaling was transferred, 1 if not

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, wave channels, wave sweeps, variable entrySourceType)
memberdef.name: SF_GetActiveChannelNumbers

briefdescription.para: Use the labnotebook information to return the active channel numbers for a given set of sweeps.

parameterdescription.para: type of the labnotebook entry, one of DataAcqModes. If you don't care about the entry source type pass UNKNOWN_MODE.

simplesect.para: a SF_FormulaExecutor style channels() wave with two columns containing channelType and channelNumber

briefdescription.para: Pre process code entered into the notebook.

listitem.para: cut off last CR from back conversion with TextWaveToList

briefdescription.para: Checks input code, sets globals for jsonId and error string.
Return the sweep formula code in raw and with all necessary preprocesssing.

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, string code, wave data=defaultValue, string name=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SF_CreateResultsWaveWithCode

memberdef.argsstring: (variable epType, wave out, variable outCnt, string name=defaultValue, string treeLevel=defaultValue, string startTime=defaultValue, string endtime=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SF_EpochsSetOutValues

detaileddescription.para: channels([str name]+) converts a named channel from string to numbers.
sweeps([str type]) type: |displayed|all displayed (default): get (selected) sweeps all: get all possible sweeps
returns [[sweeps][channel]] for all [sweeps] in list sweepNumbers, grouped by channels

para.computeroutput: labnotebook(string key, array channels, array sweeps [, string entrySourceType])

detaileddescription.para: return lab notebook key for all sweeps that belong to the channels channels

memberdef.argsstring: (wave tpData, wave tpStart, wave sweepData, variable i)
memberdef.name: SF_AverageTPFromSweepImpl

briefdescription.para: SF Sweep formula allows to do analysis on sweeps with a dedicated formula language
